creator: hirner@bitfire.at
text:
Hello,

At the moment, MySQL for TeamSpeak is not supported by the port. Do you
need it? Maybe the /usr/local/lib/teamspeak/server/libts3db_mysql.so
shouldn't be even installed by the port, but I haven't tried whether
TeamSpeak needs it.

Please provide more information about what you want to achieve /
suggestions.

Best regards,
R Hirner
